name: session-lifecycle
description: Give your AI assistant a memory that survives across sessions. Five commands scaffold and drive a session loop over an Obsidian vault: /session-setup builds the folder skeleton, /session-start briefs you from persisted state, /session-track logs progress mid-session, /session-close writes reflection + log + state + next-session starter + daily note, and /session-handoff produces a compact handoff for a fresh agent.
